FAULT-101.title: Signal Fault
FAULT-101.description: Signalling anomaly detected on Track 1. Aspect controller failing intermittently. Inspect relay cabinet on the right-hand side of the platform.
FAULT-101.component: Relay cabinet — look for the metal enclosure with wiring terminals. Check for the red fault indicator light on the lower-left panel.

FAULT-102.title: Cable Degradation
FAULT-102.description: Insulation wear on traction power feeder cable. Visible cracking along 5m section to the left of the inspection door.
FAULT-102.component: Traction feeder cable — look for the black rubber-jacketed cable running along the wall. Cracking and discolouration will be visible on the outer insulation.

FAULT-103.title: Structural Wear
FAULT-103.description: Hairline cracking along the tunnel lining 15m straight ahead. Water ingress observed. Schedule structural survey before next service window.
FAULT-103.component: Tunnel lining — look for hairline cracks running vertically through the concrete segments. Water streaking or damp patches indicate active ingress.
